name: stoc-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for STOC (ACM Symposium on Theory of Computing) submissions: venue fit for broad-audience theory results, HotCRP submission checks under the abstract + table-of-contents + 12-page reading rule, double-blind hygiene, extended-abstract vs arXiv/ECCC full-version discipline, proof checkability, STOC/FOCS cycle planning, and ACM camera-ready. Grounded in the STOC 2026 CFP and SIGACT pages checked on 2026-07-08.
